  • Hide All Code

ERT Pilot — Exploratory Results

By-subject aggregation

Guido Maria Caruso

2026-03-31

library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(car)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

Overview

Pilot data from the ERT task.

Analytical approach: trial data aggregated to participant means per condition × valence × trial position. LMM fitted on these means with condition, valence, and trial_in_mini as within-subject factors.

df_raw <- list.files(path = ".", pattern = "FULL\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE) |>
  map_dfr(read_csv, show_col_types = FALSE,
          col_types = cols(participant_id = col_character())) |>
  filter(segment_type == "main") |>
  mutate(
    participant_id = as.factor(participant_id),
    condition      = factor(condition,
                            levels = c("synchronous", "faster", "slower")),
    emotion        = factor(emotion,
                            levels = c("happiness", "anger", "fear")),
    valence        = factor(ifelse(emotion == "happiness", "positive", "negative"),
                            levels = c("positive", "negative")),
    trial_in_mini  = as.factor(trial_in_mini),
    intensity      = as.numeric(intensity),
    vas_value      = as.numeric(vas_value),
    rt             = as.numeric(rt)
  )

# Aggregazione per partecipante
df <- df_raw |>
  group_by(participant_id, condition, valence, trial_in_mini) |>
  summarise(
    vas_m = mean(vas_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    rt_m  = mean(rt, na.rm = TRUE),
    n     = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

N participants: 7
Rows after aggregation: 252 (= 7 participants × 3 conditions × 2 valences × 6 trial positions)

1. Descriptives

VAS by condition

df |>
  group_by(condition) |>
  summarise(M = round(mean(vas_m), 2),
            SD = round(sd(vas_m), 2),
            n = n()) |>
  kable() |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE)
condition M SD n
synchronous -5.23 31.97 84
faster -5.32 31.30 84
slower -5.24 32.31 84

VAS by valence

df |>
  group_by(valence) |>
  summarise(M = round(mean(vas_m), 2),
            SD = round(sd(vas_m), 2),
            n = n()) |>
  kable() |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE)
valence M SD n
positive 22.98 14.06 126
negative -33.50 14.73 126

df |>
  group_by(condition, valence) |>
  summarise(M = round(mean(vas_m), 2),
            SD = round(sd(vas_m), 2),
            n = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  kable() |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE)

synchronous negative -33.71 15.23 42

2. Main analysis — VAS

Model: vas_m ~ condition * valence * trial_in_mini + (1 | participant_id)

lmm_main <- lmer(
  vas_m ~ condition * valence * trial_in_mini +
    (1 | participant_id),
  data    = df,
  REML    = TRUE,
  control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa",
                        optCtrl   = list(maxfun = 2e5))
)

ANOVA table (Type III)

bold_anova(lmm_main)
Effect Sum Sq Mean Sq NumDF DenDF F value Pr(>F)
condition 0.465 0.232 2 210 0.0012 0.9988
valence 200964.334 200964.334 1 210 1001.3001 < .001
trial_in_mini 811.407 162.281 5 210 0.8086 0.5447
condition:valence 36.980 18.490 2 210 0.0921 0.9120
condition:trial_in_mini 1444.292 144.429 10 210 0.7196 0.7055
valence:trial_in_mini 746.940 149.388 5 210 0.7443 0.5911
condition:valence:trial_in_mini 1053.788 105.379 10 210 0.5250 0.8714

3. Post-hoc — condition × valence

emm <- emmeans(lmm_main, ~ condition | valence)
contrast(emm, method = "pairwise", adjust = "bonferroni") |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 4))) |>
  kable() |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) |>
  row_spec(which(
    contrast(emm, method = "pairwise", adjust = "bonferroni") |>
      as.data.frame() |> pull(p.value) < 0.05
  ), bold = TRUE)
contrast valence estimate SE df t.ratio p.value
synchronous - faster positive 0.8819 3.0915 210 0.2853 1
synchronous - slower positive -0.0391 3.0915 210 -0.0127 1
faster - slower positive -0.9210 3.0915 210 -0.2979 1
synchronous - faster negative -0.6867 3.0915 210 -0.2221 1
synchronous - slower negative 0.0687 3.0915 210 0.0222 1
faster - slower negative 0.7555 3.0915 210 0.2444 1

4. Post-hoc — LMM split by condition

Tests whether valence × trial_in_mini interaction is significant within each condition separately.

split_results <- map_dfr(levels(df$condition), function(cond) {
  sub <- df |> filter(condition == cond)
  m <- tryCatch(
    lmer(vas_m ~ valence * trial_in_mini + (1 | participant_id),
         data = sub, REML = TRUE,
         control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa")),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (!is.null(m)) {
    a <- anova(m, type = 3)
    row <- a["valence:trial_in_mini", ]
    tibble(
      Condition = cond,
      F         = round(row$`F value`, 3),
      df_num    = row$NumDF,
      df_den    = round(row$DenDF, 1),
      p         = round(row$`Pr(>F)`, 4)
    )
  }
})

split_results |>
  kable(caption = "valence x trial_in_mini interaction per condition") |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) |>
  row_spec(which(split_results$p < 0.05), bold = TRUE)
valence x trial_in_mini interaction per condition
Condition F df_num df_den p
synchronous 0.555 5 66 0.7342
faster 0.686 5 66 0.6355
slower 0.501 5 66 0.7743

5. Reaction Times

Descriptives

df |>
  group_by(condition, valence) |>
  summarise(M  = round(mean(rt_m), 3),
            SD = round(sd(rt_m), 3),
            n  = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  kable(caption = "RT per condition x valence (participant means)") |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE)
RT per condition x valence (participant means)
condition valence M SD n
synchronous positive 1.463 0.710 42
synchronous negative 1.470 0.745 42
faster positive 1.255 0.398 42
faster negative 1.197 0.446 42
slower positive 1.312 0.442 42
slower negative 1.215 0.446 42

LMM — RT

lmm_rt <- lmer(
  rt_m ~ condition * valence * trial_in_mini +
    (1 | participant_id),
  data    = df,
  REML    = TRUE,
  control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa",
                        optCtrl   = list(maxfun = 2e5))
)
bold_anova(lmm_rt)
Effect Sum Sq Mean Sq NumDF DenDF F value Pr(>F)
condition 2.817 1.409 2 210 10.4916 < .001
valence 0.152 0.152 1 210 1.1310 0.2888
trial_in_mini 0.478 0.096 5 210 0.7114 0.6155
condition:valence 0.114 0.057 2 210 0.4238 0.6551
condition:trial_in_mini 0.431 0.043 10 210 0.3212 0.9750
valence:trial_in_mini 0.115 0.023 5 210 0.1716 0.9729
condition:valence:trial_in_mini 0.819 0.082 10 210 0.6098 0.8047

6. Visualisations

Exposure effect — VAS

df |>
  group_by(condition, valence, trial_in_mini) |>
  summarise(M  = mean(vas_m),
            SE = sd(vas_m) / sqrt(n()),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = trial_in_mini, y = M,
             color = condition, group = condition)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = M - SE, ymax = M + SE, fill = condition),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ valence, labeller = labeller(
    valence = c(positive = "Positive (happiness)",
                negative = "Negative (anger + fear)"))) +
  labs(title = "Exposure effect of FFB on VAS — participant means",
       x = "Trial position in block (1–6)",
       y = "Mean VAS ± SE",
       color = "Condition", fill = "Condition") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

VAS per condition × valence

df |>
  group_by(participant_id, condition, valence) |>
  summarise(vas_m2 = mean(vas_m), .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = condition, y = vas_m2, fill = condition)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.4, trim = FALSE) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "crossbar", width = 0.4,
               color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ valence) +
  labs(title = "VAS per condition x valence",
       x = "Condition", y = "Mean VAS",
       caption = "Crossbar = grand mean; dots = participants") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

RT per condition × valence

df |>
  group_by(participant_id, condition, valence) |>
  summarise(rt_m2 = mean(rt_m), .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = condition, y = rt_m2, fill = condition)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.4, trim = FALSE) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "crossbar", width = 0.4,
               color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ valence) +
  labs(title = "RT per condition x valence",
       x = "Condition", y = "Mean RT (s)",
       caption = "Crossbar = grand mean; dots = participants") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

Exposure effect — RT

df |>
  group_by(condition, valence, trial_in_mini) |>
  summarise(M  = mean(rt_m),
            SE = sd(rt_m) / sqrt(n()),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = trial_in_mini, y = M,
             color = condition, group = condition)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = M - SE, ymax = M + SE, fill = condition),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ valence, labeller = labeller(
    valence = c(positive = "Positive (happiness)",
                negative = "Negative (anger + fear)"))) +
  labs(title = "RT over trial position — participant means",
       x = "Trial position in block (1–6)",
       y = "Mean RT ± SE (s)",
       color = "Condition", fill = "Condition") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)
